start: ^I'm making my rounds of the ward. Let me know if you need anything.

c-1: ^Of course. I'll be nearby if anything comes up.

patrol_detail: ^I cover the whole ward — beds, station, and the far end. Three checkpoints, continuous loop.
patrol_idle: ^I'm making my rounds of the ward.
patient_alert_response: ^I'm coming right away to assess the patient!
incident_response: ^MAJOR INCIDENT DECLARED — All staff report to emergency protocols now!
